name: Potato Devil's Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening until smooth.
2. Add sugar, melted chocolate (over hot water), and mashed potatoes. Beat thoroughly.
3. Incorporate egg yolk and evaporated milk. Mix well.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the batter, mixing thoroughly.
6. Stir in chopped nuts and vanilla extract.
7. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites until just combined.
8. Pour the mixture into prepared layer cake pans.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 25-30 minutes.
Mrs. H.E. Chrisman, Scottsbluff, NE.
